root.sql:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_group_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD month พ.ศ. yyyy') as sysdate_tdate
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '087224' )

r_ktm_member_book_assure_nest.sql:
SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance, to_snumber(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance) as c_deposit_balance , 0 as c_count_lon , 0 as c_count_dep , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_dep_acc_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai (sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance) as thai_deposit_balance, '' as thai_share_stock
FROM sc_dep_m_creditor WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 )
union
select 'share' , ' ' , share_stock ,to_snumber(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) as c_deposit_balance , ( SELECT count(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) ) as c_count_lon , ( SELECT count(sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no) FROM sc_dep_m_creditor WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 ) ) as c_count_dep
,deposit_account_no ,'' as thai_deposit_balance ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) as thai_share_stock
from sc_mem_m_share_mem where membership_no = {0}

r_ktm_member_book_assure_nest_loan.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance) as thai_principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 )
